title: LOPHE Exfoliating Back Scrubber for Shower, 34 Inches Back Scrubber with Handles, Double Sided Body Exfoliator Bath Tool, Exfoliating Washcloth to Scrub Your Body Deeply for Men & Women (Blue Gray)

features: FULL COVERAGE: The 68 cm extra-long bath area can easily clean hard-to-reach areas. Compared with traditional back brushes, our back brush is wider and longer, which is more convenient for daily use

REJUVENATE SOFT SKIN: Double Sided Body Exfoliator is specially designed for back skin and can be used on both sides, the raised texture fabric can remove deeper dirt, dead skin, etc., making your skin smooth, healthy and radiant

EASY TO USE: Wet your body with warm water before use, apply a little shower gel on your body, grab the two handles, rub your back with appropriate force, it can deeply cleanse the skin while producing rich foam

EXTREMELY DURABLE: Our Exfoliating body scrub won't collapse, get wet or smell like traditional loofahs, durable stitching and quick-drying woven nylon netting ensure our products stay strong, dry and fresh

ENJOY SPA TREATMENT: Shower back scrubber can stimulate skin and increase blood circulation, easily relieve body fatigue, let you feel comfortable all day, enjoy spa treatment at home, meet your bathing needs from head to toe
